name: loen
description: Loop Engineering workflow assets for bounded planning, action, checking, reflection, repair, research, review, and governance.

interface.shortDescription: Loop Engineering workflow assets for Codex
interface.longDescription: LoEn provides source assets for durable loop artifacts, role-specific skills, inert hook scripts, templates, and agent definitions. Installation and runtime enablement are handled by later integration layers.
defaultPrompt: Start a LoEn loop for this task.
Check the active LoEn loop status.
